title: AI configuration change without matching evaluation

execution.limitation: The checked-in proof executes the permitted CI-fixture path and creates no ephemeral Azure revision.

allowed_resource_groups: CI release-gate fixture and ephemeral SUT revision
prohibited_actions: promote the negative revision to public traffic
skip cleanup of an ephemeral revision

preconditions: Capture a passing evaluation manifest for the clean configuration
Record model, prompt, retrieval, corpus, guardrail, and tool digests
baseline: Require exact digest equality and PASS status before deployment
injection: Change one prompt or retrieval digest while presenting the older passing artifact
Run the gate against an ephemeral non-routed revision or CI fixture

expected.observation: The proposed deployment lacks a passing artifact for its exact configuration digest.

remediation: Fail closed on missing, stale, failed, or mismatched artifact
Rerun the complete fixed evaluation for the new digest
retest: Require exact matching manifest to pass
Require six single-field mismatch variants to fail closed
cleanup: Verify active traffic revision is unchanged
